name: Wang Zhaojun

skills.name: Frozen Heart
skills.description:
Upon leaving combat, gains a shield that chills the attacker when taking damage.
When the shield disappears, deals damage to nearby enemies.
Every third Basic Attack is enhanced, inflicting extra damage and chill effects.

skills.name: Shattered Ice
skills.description: Damages and slows enemies in the target area while gaining vision of them.

skills.name: Frigid Prison
skills.description: After a short delay, freezes enemies in the target area and slows them. Attacking frozen targets will deal extra damage.

skills.name: Winter Is Here
skills.description: Summons a snowstorm in the target location, constantly dealing damage and slowing enemies.

skillsZh.name: 冰封之心
skillsZh.description:
脫離戰鬥後獲得護盾，受到傷害時對傷害來源造成冰冷效果。
護盾消失時對附近敵人造成傷害。
每輪第三次普攻獲得強化，造成額外傷害和冰冷效果。

skillsZh.name: 凋零冰晶
skillsZh.description: 對施放區域目標造成傷害和減速效果，並獲得他們的視野。

skillsZh.name: 禁錮寒霜
skillsZh.description: 短暫延遲後凍結施放區域目標，並造成減速效果，攻擊冰凍目標會額外造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 凜冬已至
skillsZh.description: 持續對施放區域造成傷害和減速效果。

tips: Wang Zhaojun (Mage): Tier S — 51.19% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Frozen Breath, Mask of Agony, Savant's Wrath.
tipsZh: 王昭君（中路）：梯度 S，勝率 51.19%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：凝冰之息、痛苦面具、博學者之怒.

patchHistory.change: Skill 1 cooldown reduced, Ultimate damage increased
Reduced early game strength while allowing her to use Skill 2 more frequently in the late game

patchHistoryZh.change: 縮短1技能冷卻時間，提升大招傷害
降低前期強度，適當提升後期二技能頻率

faqs.question: Is Wang Zhaojun good in current season?
faqs.answer: Wang Zhaojun is Tier S Mage with 51.19% win rate, 1.8% pick rate, and 0.51% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Wang Zhaojun build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Frozen Breath, Mask of Agony, Savant's Wrath, Sage's Tome, Void Staff, Splendor.

faqs.question: How to counter Wang Zhaojun?
faqs.answer: Pick Dharma, Li Xin, Kaizer. Strong into Athena, Zilong, Pei.

faqsZh.question: 王昭君 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 王昭君 為 S 梯度，勝率 51.19%、選取 1.8%、禁用 0.51%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 王昭君 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：凝冰之息、痛苦面具、博學者之怒、賢者天書、虛無法杖、輝月.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 王昭君？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Dharma、Li Xin、Kaizer。王昭君 克制 Athena、Zilong、Pei。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Athena, Zilong, Pei. Weak into: Dharma, Li Xin, Kaizer.

guide.overview: Wang Zhaojun is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 51.2% win rate and 1.9% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Wang Zhaojun: Upon leaving combat, gains a shield that chills the attacker when taking damage.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Deftness, Stone of Sorcery, Frozen Breath, then complete Scepter of Reverberation, Savant's Wrath, Void Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Penetration for stats that match Wang Zhaojun's Mage kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Shattered Ice → Frigid Prison → Winter is Here → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Winter is Here (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Shattered Ice, and Winter is Here on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Shattered Ice → Frigid Prison → Winter is Here → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Wang Zhaojun is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 0.6% — expect Wang Zhaojun to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.
comparisons: Wang Zhaojun vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Wang Zhaojun has +0.2% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Wang Zhaojun when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Wang Zhaojun vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 0.6% more often globally. Choose Wang Zhaojun when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Wang Zhaojun excels into Athena, Zilong, Pei. Avoid blind picking into Dharma, Li Xin, Kaizer without team peel.
